review_text: Great friendly staff and neighbourhood good crabbing spot just quietly
What a spot. Good fishing. Has good facilities, camp kitchen and a laundry.

Quiet spot right on the water, friendly (and quiet) locals, BBQ and playground area next door, as well as a long walking path around the waterfront and fishing off the pier just outside the park, which has clean and accessible amenities. General store over the road that sells all the basic essentials (including smokes), basic takeaways (fish and chips etc.), fuel if you need it, plus a post office.
Felt strange feeling so remote while being 40 mins outside Brisbane!! Definitely recommend, and would go back in future :)

What a little gem. Definitely a fisherman’s caravan park but such a ripper as well. Nothing fancy just good people and relaxed vibe. Most people have boats or just fish off the bank. Next to the main boat ramp which is very busy during the peak season. Everyone is extremely friendly and laid back. The post office and the general store are both awesome for a feed. We love finding laid back places like this for the kids
Great place to stay great shop across the road clean tidy looked after thanks girls fir a great stay and food burgers are great by the way
Very good
Great place ,right on the water. If your into fishing this is the place. Backs onto Boat Ramp. Clean amenities and staff where helpful.
Shhh dun tell anyone....

Nice park.
Clean showers and toilets, lovely place for some r and r!
Tight sites
Was ice cold!!
Great caravan park with amenities that are upkept well. 2 takeaway stores and a bowls club close by. Nice and quiet the majority of the time.
Magnificent location  the location store post office fish n chips shop good feed

Possibly the smallest "full service" caravan park I've visited with approx 17 casual sites well kept, tidy and clean. Equal number of "permanents" with the park split down the middle, permanents one side and casuals the other. Clean amenities & dump point. PO, general store, bait and take away across the road and another 20m away. Boat ramp at the back of the park and childrens playground, park and picnic table next door. Good value park, quiet, clean, neat and tidy. Nice walk along the foreshore.
Hidden Gem. Only 50 bays. Small park so you have to do some maneuvering to get into some spots.
Friendly staff very clean amenities good size sites
There may be times that the place get crowded, but still a great place to visit. Definitely coming back!
It was very wet, at the time, it's great that, the amenities are all coded, short walk to everything, such as fishing, shops , only down fall is the mozzies
A haven
Wow I really loved it. I'll be definitely visiting again
Relaxing place to stay
Great place 👍
